title: Stunspot's Guide to AI Systems: The AI Engineering Systems Canon
description: A Markdown-native knowledge repository built primarily to support AI-assisted design, engineering, analysis, evaluation, and decision-making across modern AI systems. Its main audience is the model: when loaded into an AI workspace, RAG pipeline, long-context session, agent memory layer, or retrieval corpus, the Guide functions as a dense architectural substrate, providing structured doctrine, field vocabulary, decision frameworks, failure maps, design patterns, evaluation logic, and operational heuristics. The canon is organized across 12 volumes and 37 reports (AI-ENG-A through AI-ENG-AK), spanning model steering, context architecture, corpus engineering, retrieval, model lifecycle, runtime mechanics, agents, tools, multimodal interfaces, security, resilience, evaluation, telemetry, governance, product architecture, and system doctrine.
notes: Constructed with a mix of GPT and Gemini Deep Research under human editorial direction. First-pass v1.0 complete; comprehensive source double-check pending.
